title: Title
deleteShiftConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this shift?
deleteSeriesConfirm: This is a recurring shift. Do you want to delete only this event, or the entire series?
editSeriesConfirm: This is a recurring shift. Do you want to update just this event or the entire series?
backupPasswordPrompt: Enter a password to encrypt the backup
backupPasswordTooShort: The backup password must be at least {min} characters long.
backupPasswordHint: Use at least 12 characters. A long, unique password protects your backup.
backupPasswordInvalid: Invalid backup password or corrupted file.
backupFileTooLarge: The backup file is too large.
resetConfirm: WARNING: You are about to delete all data. This action is irreversible. Are you sure?
noData: No data available for this period
endMustBeAfterStart: End date/time must be after start date/time
updateAvailableDesc: An update is ready to install
decryptionErrorMessage: The saved data cannot be decrypted, likely because the encryption key has changed. You can reset the app or close this dialog to keep the unreadable data until you restore a backup.
invalidDateFormat: Invalid date format. Please use YYYY-MM-DD.
dateOutOfRange: Please enter a date between 1900 and 2100.
failedToParseDate: Failed to parse date. Please check the format.
searchOutsideRange: Search outside quick range (-12m/+24m). Results show only the selected date.
reducedSecurityStorage: Reduced-security mode: IndexedDB unavailable, encryption key is stored in localStorage.
backupReminderSuggestion: Tip: export an encrypted backup from Settings. If you clear browser data or switch device your shifts cannot be recovered.
authForgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
authOr: or
authGuestWarningBody: Your data will only be saved on this device. If you uninstall the app, clear your browser data or change phone, you may lose it. You won't be able to sync shifts across devices.
authPasswordInvalid: Password does not meet all requirements.
authResetEmailSent: Reset email sent. Check your inbox.
authRegistrationSuccess: Account created. Check your email to verify the address.
authVerificationBody: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link to activate your account, then come back here.
authVerificationCooldown: Please wait a few seconds before requesting another email.
authVerificationStillPending: The address isn't verified yet. Open the link from your email.
accountGuestMode: You are in guest mode. Data is stored only on this device.
authDeleteAccountWarningBody: The Firebase account will be deleted. Local data on this device will be erased and cannot be recovered.
authDeleteAccountReauthRequired: To delete the account, sign in again and repeat the operation.
authDeleteAccountEmailMismatch: The typed email does not match the account.
authGenericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
authErrorEmailInUse: Email already registered. Try signing in.
authErrorTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
authErrorPopupBlocked: The browser blocked the sign-in popup. Allow popups and try again.
deviceLimitExceededBody: You have linked more than 4 devices. Synchronization may not be guaranteed on all terminals.
